title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
